---
name: ✨ Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement for Heimdall
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: gpadidala
---

## ✨ What problem are you trying to solve?

A clear description of the real-world situation where you ran into a limitation.
*Example: "During a Grafana upgrade from 10.x to 11.x, I want to verify that all my alert rules still route correctly — currently I have to check each one manually."*

## 💡 Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen. Be concrete — "a new test category called X that checks Y".

## 🔄 Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you've tried, or other tools you looked at.

## 🧩 Which area of Heimdall?

- [ ] New test category
- [ ] Existing test category enhancement
- [ ] UI / Dashboard
- [ ] Reports / Export
- [ ] AI analysis
- [ ] Dependency graph
- [ ] CI/CD integration
- [ ] API
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (describe)

## 📏 How critical is this for your use case?

- [ ] Blocker — can't adopt Heimdall without this
- [ ] High — significant pain point
- [ ] Medium — nice to have
- [ ] Low — exploratory idea

## 💬 Additional context

Sample data, screenshots, links to Grafana docs — anything that helps.
